---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: Development of a Reporting Guideline for Trochim’s Concept Mapping
acronym: ConMapT
description: Reporting of concept mapping research.
rg-doi: ''
pmid-id: ''
pmid-url: ''
relevant-urls: '[Read the full-text](https://www.mdpi.com/2409-9279/8/2/24) of this
  reporting guideline.'
full-bibliographic-reference: Pantha S, Jones M, Gray R. Development of a Reporting
  Guideline for Trochim’s Concept Mapping. Methods Protoc. 2025;8(2):24.


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: English
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: ''
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: ''
additional-languages: ''
additional-information: |-
  [Read the protocol](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/35742523/) for the development of this reporting guideline.

  [Read the systematic review](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37888033/) that informed the development of this reporting guideline.
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: ''
other: ''
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
# - Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
# - Clinical practice guidelines
# - Clinical trials
# - Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
# - Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
- Mixed methods studies
# - Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
# - Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
# - Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
# - Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
# - Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
# - Psychology
# - Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
- No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
# - Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
# - Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
# - Outcomes (variables)
# - Procedure/Method
# - Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
# - Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
- Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- cluster map
- clustering
- concept map
- concept mapping
- ConMapT
- GCM
- group concept mapping
- map
- mapping
- mixed method
- mixed methods
- Trochim
- Trochim?s concept mapping

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
